    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

MERGE [Products] USING (
VALUES (@p175, @p176, @p177, @p178, @p179, @p180, @p181, @p182, @p183, @p184, @p185, @p186, @p187, @p188, @p189, @p190, @p191, @p192, @p193, @p194, @p195, @p196, @p197, @p198, @p199, @p200, 0),
(@p201, @p202, @p203, @p204, @p205, @p206, @p207, @p208, @p209, @p210, @p211, @p212, @p213, @p214, @p215, @p216, @p217, @p218, @p219, @p220, @p221, @p222, @p223, @p224, @p225, @p226, 1),
(@p227, @p228, @p229, @p230, @p231, @p232, @p233, @p234, @p235, @p236, @p237, @p238, @p239, @p240, @p241, @p242, @p243, @p244, @p245, @p246, @p247, @p248, @p249, @p250, @p251, @p252, 2),
(@p253, @p254, @p255, @p256, @p257, @p258, @p259, @p260, @p261, @p262, @p263, @p264, @p265, @p266, @p267, @p268, @p269, @p270, @p271, @p272, @p273, @p274, @p275, @p276, @p277, @p278, 3),
(@p279, @p280, @p281, @p282, @p283, @p284, @p285, @p286, @p287, @p288, @p289, @p290, @p291, @p292, @p293, @p294, @p295, @p296, @p297, @p298, @p299, @p300, @p301, @p302, @p303, @p304, 4)) AS i ([Id], [BranchId], [BrandId], [CatalogBadge], [CategoryId], [CreatedBy], [CreatedOnUtc], [CurrentCost], [DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [Description], [ImagePath], [InternalCode], [IsActive], [IsDeleted], [LastModifiedBy], [LastModifiedOnUtc], [Name], [ProductStatus], [ProductType], [RequiresBatchControl], [RequiresSerialNumber], [ShortDescription], [SoldOutAt], [SoldOutBy], [TaxId], [TrackInventory], _Position) ON 1=0
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT ([Id], [BranchId], [BrandId], [CatalogBadge], [CategoryId], [CreatedBy], [CreatedOnUtc], [CurrentCost], [DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [Description], [ImagePath], [InternalCode], [IsActive], [IsDeleted], [LastModifiedBy], [LastModifiedOnUtc], [Name], [ProductStatus], [ProductType], [RequiresBatchControl], [RequiresSerialNumber], [ShortDescription], [SoldOutAt], [SoldOutBy], [TaxId], [TrackInventory])
VALUES (i.[Id], i.[BranchId], i.[BrandId], i.[CatalogBadge], i.[CategoryId], i.[CreatedBy], i.[CreatedOnUtc], i.[CurrentCost], i.[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], i.[Description], i.[ImagePath], i.[InternalCode], i.[IsActive], i.[IsDeleted], i.[LastModifiedBy], i.[LastModifiedOnUtc], i.[Name], i.[ProductStatus], i.[ProductType], i.[RequiresBatchControl], i.[RequiresSerialNumber], i.[ShortDescription], i.[SoldOutAt], i.[SoldOutBy], i.[TaxId], i.[TrackInventory])
OUTPUT INSERTED.[AllowPromotions], INSERTED.[AutoMarkSoldOut], INSERTED.[DisplayOrder], INSERTED.[FavoriteOrder], INSERTED.[HighlightInCatalog], INSERTED.[IsCatalogVisible], INSERTED.[IsFavorite], INSERTED.[IsSoldOut], INSERTED.[MinimumStock], i._Position;
MERGE [Inventory] USING (
VALUES (@p305, @p306, @p307, @p308, @p309, @p310, @p311, @p312, @p313, @p314, 0),

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowPromotions], [p].[AutoMarkSoldOut], [p].[BranchId], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CatalogBadge], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOnUtc], [p].[CurrentCost], [p].[DefaultUnitOfMeasureId], [p].[Description], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[FavoriteOrder], [p].[HighlightInCatalog], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsCatalogVisible], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFavorite], [p].[IsSoldOut], [p].[LastModifiedBy], [p].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[ProductStatus], [p].[ProductType], [p].[RequiresBatchControl], [p].[RequiresSerialNumber], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[SoldOutAt], [p].[SoldOutBy], [p].[TaxId], [p].[TrackInventory]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[InternalCode] = @__data_Code_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductPresentations] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]

) AS [t2] ON [p].[TaxId] = [t2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[AllowPurchase], [p0].[AllowSale], [p0].[Barcode], [p0].[ConversionFactor], [p0].[Cost], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[IsBaseUnit], [p0].[IsDefaultSalePresentation], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[Name], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[RetailPrice], [p0].[SemiWholesalePrice], [p0].[UnitOfMeasureId], [p0].[WholesalePrice], [t5].[Id] AS [Id0], [t5].[BranchId], [t5].[Code], [t5].[CreatedBy], [t5].[CreatedOnUtc], [t5].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t5].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t5].[LastModifiedBy], [t5].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [t5].[Name] AS [Name0]
    FROM [ProductPresentations] AS [p0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[BranchId], [u0].[Code], [u0].[CreatedBy], [u0].[CreatedOnUtc], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[IsDeleted], [u0].[LastModifiedBy], [u0].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [u0].[Name]
        FROM [UnitsOfMeasure] AS [u0]
        WHERE [u0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t5] ON [p0].[UnitOfMeasureId] = [t5].[Id]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [p].[Id] = [t4].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b0].[BranchId], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[CreatedBy], [b0].[CreatedOnUtc], [b0].[IsActive], [b0].[LastModifiedBy], [b0].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [b0].[LocalSalePrice], [b0].[MaxDiscountPercentage], [b0].[MinSalePrice], [t7].[Id], [t7].[Address], [t7].[BranchId] AS [BranchId0], [t7].[Code], [t7].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t7].[CreatedOnUtc] AS [CreatedOnUtc0], [t7].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t7].[IsDeleted], [t7].[LastModifiedBy] AS [LastModifiedBy0], [t7].[LastModifiedOnUtc] AS [LastModifiedOnUtc0], [t7].[Name], [t7].[Phone]
    FROM [BranchProducts] AS [b0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [b1].[Id], [b1].[Address], [b1].[BranchId], [b1].[Code], [b1].[CreatedBy], [b1].[CreatedOnUtc], [b1].[IsActive], [b1].[IsDeleted], [b1].[LastModifiedBy], [b1].[LastModifiedOnUtc], [b1].[Name], [b1].[Phone]
        FROM [Branches] AS [b1]
        WHERE [b1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t7] ON [b0].[BranchId] = [t7].[Id]
) AS [t6] ON [p].[Id] = [t6].[ProductId]
WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[IsCatalogVisible] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [p].[InternalCode], [p].[Id], [t].[Id], [t0].[Id], [t1].[Id], [t2].[Id], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0], [t6].[BranchId], [t6].[ProductId]
